description: Clarion Assistant safety hooks — blocks dangerous commands, protects secrets and credentials

hooks.command: $sln = Get-ChildItem -Filter '*.sln' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($sln) { if (-not (Test-Path '.git')) { Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Clarion solution detected but no git repo found in this directory. Use AskUserQuestion to ask if they want to initialize git for code safety. Options: (1) Yes, initialize git with a baseline commit (Recommended) (2) Skip for now. If they choose yes: (1) Create a .gitignore for Clarion projects (ignore *.exe, *.dll, *.obj, *.lib, *.exp, *.pdb, *.map, *.res, *.o, bin/, obj/, Debug/, Release/, *.log, *.bak, *.~*, ~*, *.tmp, *.sdf, *.suo, .vs/) (2) Run git init (3) Stage files by name - do NOT use git add . or git add -A, instead add specific file extensions like *.sln *.cwproj *.clw *.inc *.equ *.int *.trn *.app *.dct *.txa *.gitignore (4) Create baseline commit."}}' } }

$sln = Get-ChildItem -Filter '*.sln' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($sln) { $db = Get-ChildItem -Filter '*.codegraph.db' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $db) { Write-Output ('{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"SLN found: ' + $sln.Name + ' but no .codegraph.db found in this directory. Use AskUserQuestion to ask: Would you like to index this solution for code intelligence? Options: (1) Yes, index the solution (Recommended) - enables cross-file symbol search, who-calls-who, impact analysis (2) Skip for now. If they choose yes, call index_solution."}}') } }
